title: Bisikan Dinding Besi
theme: Menjelajahi bagaimana kecemasan sehari-hari dan overthinking dapat mengubah situasi yang paling biasa menjadi pengalaman yang absurd dan menegangkan.

cover.prompt: A cinematic shot from a high-rise apartment corridor. Gently opening lift doors reveal a warm, inviting interior. Golden hour light bathes the polished marble floor and reflects softly. A silhouetted figure, carrying a practical tote bag, steps into the lift, conveying a quiet moment of transition at the end of a long day.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Rina's routine elevator ride home turns into a paranoiac journey through perceived glitches, strange occurrences, and distorted reality, climaxing in an alien floor and a silent, unsettling security guard, leaving her to question the line between reality and anxiety-induced delusion.
meta.target_emotion: Unease, amusement, slight dread, reflection on urban anxiety.
